ideology.title: The 5-Stage Revenue Engine
ideology.description: Whether you sell software or sausages, the math is the same. Stop "flying blind" and start measuring the pulse of your business.

stages.title: 1. Awareness (The Handshake)
stages.description: Before they shake your hand, they Google your name. 83% of the journey is invisible (Dark Social). We make sure you show up when it matters.

stages.title: 2. Consideration (The Trust)
stages.description: Do they believe you? You don't need a fancy brochure; you need proof. We build the Case Studies and Calculators that validate your expertise.

stages.title: 3. Decision (The Choice)
stages.description: Don't make them work to hire you. We remove the friction (Lead Qualification) so the right customers can book you instantly.

stages.title: 4. Conversion (The Deal)
stages.description: Strike while the iron is hot. If you wait > 5 minutes to reply, they move on. We automate the follow-up (Quote-to-Cash) so you never miss a lead.

stages.title: 5. Retention (The Relationship)
stages.description: The best new customer is an old customer. We track who stays (Net Revenue Retention) and help you turn one-time buyers into lifelong partners.

about.title: The Architect
about.name: Richard Norwood
about.bio: I don't just build funnels. I engineer commercial systems. After scaling multiple SaaS companies to 8-figures, I realized that the problem isn't traffic—it's leakage. I built the Revenue Journey framework to help founders see their business as a unified machine, not a collection of fractured tactics.
